title: Design & Art Direction
description: Visual identity, layout, typography, and the aesthetic decisions that make people stop and look twice. Whether print or screen, the goal is the same — work that holds up.

title: Web Design & Development
description: From wireframe to deployment — building sites and apps that look considered, perform well, and give visitors exactly what they came for.

title: Creative Freelance
description: Independent project work in photography, video, 3D, illustration, or wherever the brief leads. Direct to work with, flexible, and invested in the outcome.

title: Collaboration & Direction
description: Working alongside teams, clients, and stakeholders to take a project from idea to shipped — clear communication, honest timelines, and work that actually gets done.
